fields.label: Location Key
fields.description: EasyEcom-issued identifier; unique within the account. The warehouse/store-level identifier found on EE's Location Master page.

fields.label: Primary
fields.description: Exactly one location per account has this set. Marks the master/user-management location.

fields.label: Operational
fields.description: Whether the integration runs operational flows against this location and posts into a Company. Independent of Primary.

fields.label: WMS Location
fields.description: Whether this location runs EasyEcom's full WMS plan (PO, GRN, cycle counting, putaway) versus OMS-only. The buying/GRN flow (§9) applies only to WMS locations.

fields.label: Serialization Enabled
fields.description: Whether EE serialization is enabled for this seller-location. When set, GRN qty is pushed per individual serial rather than as an aggregate.

fields.label: Company & Warehouse Resolution
fields.description: Required for operational locations; blank for primary-only or inert locations.

fields.label: Frappe Company
fields.description: The Frappe Company this location resolves to. Set if and only if Operational. NOT unique — several locations may resolve to the same Company (many-to-one).

fields.label: Mapped Warehouse
fields.description: The Frappe Warehouse this location represents (within frappe_company). Blank for non-operational.

fields.label: EE Company ID
fields.description: EasyEcom internal company ID (as reported by EE).

fields.label: EE Company Value (reference)
fields.description: The company value EE records against this location. Reference only; never used operationally.

fields.label: GSTIN
fields.description: Validated against India Compliance for operational locations.

fields.label: JWT Token (ciphertext)
fields.description: Cached JWT for this location_key, encrypted at rest by the controller (§3.7.2). 90-day validity. Renewed at day 85 by scheduled job. No role reads plaintext; the value is materialised only transiently inside EasyEcomClient.

fields.label: JWT Expires At
fields.description: 90-day validity. Day-85 renewal job runs proactively.
